basic_details.job_title: IIT ISM Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad (IIT ISM Dhanbad) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 22-07-2026.

age_limit.age_details: Relaxable for SC/ST/OBC/PH candidates as per GOI norms
age_limit.details: Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PH candidates is applicable as per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc (Chemistry) with 1st class or min 60% marks/6.0 CGPA (if class is not awarded), Valid CSIR-UGC NET (including LS) or GATE qualification
qualification.details: M.Sc (Chemistry) with 1st class or minimum 60% marks/6.0 CGPA (if class is not awarded). Valid CSIR-UGC NET (including LS) or GATE qualification.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- PM + (admissible HRA if staying outside the campus)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT ISM Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT ISM Dhanbad JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT ISM Dhanbad is 22nd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Sc in Chemistry with a first-class or at least 60% marks/6.0 CGPA, along with a valid CSIR-UGC NET or GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000, plus admissible House Rent Allowance (HRA) if residing outside the campus.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications need to be sent via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the subject line clearly states the post applied for.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post at IIT ISM Dhanbad.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT ISM Dhanbad offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC/PH candidates as per the norms set by the Government of India.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
